title: Implement PhonePe integration, live total calculation, delivery date display, and SMS notifications

requirements.summary: Fix PhonePe QR code click handler to use proper mobile deep link URL
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the QR code image on OrderForm opens the PhonePe app on mobile devices
The deep link uses the correct phonepe:// URL scheme
Falls back gracefully if PhonePe app is not installed

file_operations.description: Update the PhonePe QR code click handler to use the phonepe:// deep link URL scheme instead of the current implementation. Implement a click handler on the QR code image that attempts to open phonepe://pay or phonepe://upi with appropriate parameters. Add fallback logic that detects if the PhonePe app launch fails (e.g., using a timeout or window focus detection) and shows a helpful message to the user. Reference the generated QR code image at frontend/public/assets/generated/payment-qr.dim_400x400.png.

requirements.summary: Add real-time total amount calculation on OrderForm page
acceptanceCriteria: Total amount updates in real-time as quantity changes
Calculation uses correct product rates: Milk ₹60/L, Paneer ₹400/Kg, Ghee ₹1500/Kg
Total amount is displayed prominently with rupee symbol formatting
Total appears before the WhatsApp submit button

file_operations.description: Add state management for calculating and displaying the total amount dynamically. Create a computed value that multiplies the selected product's price (Milk: 60, Paneer: 400, Ghee: 1500) by the quantity input value. Display the calculated total amount in a prominent position above the WhatsApp submit button, formatted with the rupee symbol (₹) and proper number formatting. Use a useEffect or direct calculation in the render to ensure the total updates immediately when quantity or product changes. Style the total amount display to be visually prominent using the warm color scheme from the design system.

requirements.summary: Display delivery date field on DeliverySchedule page for each order
acceptanceCriteria: Delivery date is visible for each order in the delivery schedule
Date is formatted in a user-friendly way
Handles cases where delivery date may not be set

file_operations.description: Modify the order display to show the deliveryDate field from each order record. Format the deliveryDate timestamp using the same date formatting pattern used for orderDate in the component (toLocaleDateString with appropriate locale). Add conditional rendering to handle cases where deliveryDate is undefined or null, displaying a placeholder message like 'Not scheduled' or 'Pending' in those cases. Ensure the delivery date is prominently displayed alongside the existing order information in the delivery schedule list.
